node.constraint: Initialize a better-sqlite3 database named 'blog.db'. Create a 'posts' table with columns id (INTEGER PRIMARY KEY), title (TEXT), and content (TEXT) if it does not exist. Implement both POST (to insert a post) and GET (to select all posts) handlers in this route file.

Create a beautifully designed blog posts manager page at app/posts/page.tsx (clean dark layout, tailwind cards, inputs, and buttons). It must fetch posts from '/api/posts' on render/mount, display them, and show a form to submit new posts via a POST request to '/api/posts'. Refresh the posts list automatically on successful submission.
